title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Very weak and brief thunderstorms are expected for N Poland and S Central Europe.

TSTM #1
N Poland
Very weak thunderstorms may happen during stronger rain showers with risk of small hail.

The bigger threat is the non-convective strong wind gusts that will be happening most of the day in N Poland and in N Germany, with possible wind gusts up to 100km/h in the Pomeranian region.

TSTM #2
Extreme SE Germany, Austria, S Czechia, Slovakia, SE Poland, Hungary
Very weak and very brief isolated thunderstorms may happen during stronger rain showers, without any dangerous threats.
